race.comment: MISS TRUSTFUL (5) did a good job last start, beaten only 1.5 lengths over 1450m at Kilmore, after positioning forward. She is proven third-up, and the extra metres won't be an issue. Well placed with a 4kg claim and can win for the premier stable. Stablemate REGAL SURGE (1) closed off strongly last start, beaten 0.6 lengths, over 1406m at Terang when back from a break. Has the rail and should be handy in the run. Will present fitter and is sure to go close. HABITEIN (4) resumed at Warrnambool in stronger company and needed the outing. He's suited by the step up in trip and maps well. Has been kept on the fresh side and is likely to race well. KAWHIA (9) resumes and won a recent hurdle trial at the track. He's won fresh and over this journey and will be hitting the line.
